song_name: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go
version_description: Complete version of this Wham number one record from 1984,play with Clean electric guitar with reverb and chorus effects or simply acoustic guitar.You Tube link https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pIgZ7gMze7A.

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

   [Verse 1]
